title: SaaSy x monday: Access All Areas EVENT

posts.author: BeckyRichards (Becky Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ready to revolutionise how your business operates? Join us at our Birmingham HQ for “Access All Areas”, designed to help you harness the full power of monday.com.

Thursday 24th October
11am-1pm
The SaaSy People, Arca Building, Cannon Steet, Birmingham

Are you working within?

  • Operations
  • Sales
  • Marketing
  • Product Developing
  • HR

This will be an event not to be missed!

What to Expect?

Whether you’re a monday.com pro or just curious about its capabilities, this event is for you. Join us for an immersive in-person event where we bring monday.com to life, offering live demos and expert clinics to help you unlock the full potential of monday.com.

  • Expert Advice: Get personalised guidance from our SaaSy x monday.com specialists.
  • Live Demos: See firsthand how monday.com can transform your business.
  • Q&A: Have your burning questions answered.
  • New to monday.com? Discover how it can elevate your project management, product development, or CRM.

Live demos, Experts on hand for Q&A, brunch grazeboards, networking, and the opportunity to take your business to new heights. Sound appealing?

Don’t miss this opportunity to take your business to the next level!
